result.stdout:
democrite 1.0.0+414aa1c30fb3963753a03eba562f5a71c8f892b0
Copyright (c) Nexai.net

  build         create an image

  list, ls      List image in local cache.

  remove, rm    Remove image from the local cache.

  prune         Remove image and instance from the local cache.

  run           Launch a democrite generic instance specialized by the image

  stop          Stop running instances

  help          Display more information on a specific command.

  version       Display version information.

commands.payload:
democrite 1.0.0+414aa1c30fb3963753a03eba562f5a71c8f892b0
Copyright (c) Nexai.net

  build         create an image

  list, ls      List image in local cache.

  remove, rm    Remove image from the local cache.

  prune         Remove image and instance from the local cache.

  run           Launch a democrite generic instance specialized by the image

  stop          Stop running instances

  help          Display more information on a specific command.

  version       Display version information.

result.stdout:
democrite 1.0.0+414aa1c30fb3963753a03eba562f5a71c8f892b0
Copyright (c) Nexai.net

  -f, --file                 Define the file used to compile the image; default
                             use local file DemocriteImage.yml

  -t, --target               Required. Define the target name of the image
                             generated, Expected format REPOSITORY/NAME:TAG

  -w, --working-directory    (Default: ./)

  --to-cache-repository      (Default: true) Define if the result must be push
                             to local cache repository

  --to-local                 (Default: false) Define if the result must be push
                             to local file system, Write at working directory
                             place

  -p, --param                Define image build parameters

  --verbose-debug            Enabled democrite tool verbose

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

result.stdout:
democrite 1.0.0+414aa1c30fb3963753a03eba562f5a71c8f892b0
Copyright (c) Nexai.net

  -d, --detach       Launch a new instance of the image

  -n, --name         Define the instance name.

  --entry            Define a custom entry class. Attention must respect the
                     typing rules

  -e, --env          Overrride environment variables

  -i, --img          Required. define the image to run REPOSITORY/ImageId:TAG

  --verbose-debug    Enabled democrite tool verbose

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
